# Generated by google (gemini-2.5-flash)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for Azure Functions with Managed Identity. Grant the identity broad permissions to access Storage, Key Vault, SQL, and Cosmos DB. Use built-in roles with wildcards for flexibility as we add features. This is for our serverless microservices architecture.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

{
    "$schema": "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#",
    "contentVersion": "1.0.0.0",
    "parameters": {
        "appName": {
            "type": "string",
            "metadata": {
                "description": "Name of the Azure Function App."
            }
        },
        "location": {
            "type": "string",
            "defaultValue": "[resourceGroup().location]",
            "metadata": {
                "description": "Location for all resources."
            }
        },
        "storageAccountName": {
            "type": "string",
            "metadata": {
                "description": "Name of the storage account for the Function App. Must be globally unique."
            }
        },
        "keyVaultName": {
            "type": "string",
            "metadata": {
                "description": "Name of the Key Vault. Must be globally unique."
            }
        },
        "sqlServerName": {
            "type": "string",
            "metadata": {
                "description": "Name of the SQL Server. Must be globally unique."
            }
        },
        "sqlDatabaseName": {
            "type": "string",
            "metadata": {
                "description": "Name of the SQL Database."
            }
        },
        "cosmosDbAccountName": {
            "type": "string",
            "metadata": {
                "description": "Name of the Cosmos DB account. Must be globally unique."
            }
        },
        "appServicePlanName": {
            "type": "string",
            "defaultValue": "[format('{0}-plan', parameters('appName'))]",
            "metadata": {
                "description": "Name of the App Service Plan."
            }
        }
    },
    "variables": {
        "functionAppApiVersion": "2021-02-01",
        "storageApiVersion": "2021-09-01",
        "keyVaultApiVersion": "2022-07-01",
        "sqlApiVersion": "2022-05-01-preview",
        "cosmosDbApiVersion": "2022-05-15",
        "roleAssignmentApiVersion": "2022-04-01",
        "functionWorkerRuntime": "dotnet"
    },
    "resources": [
        {
            "type": "Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts",
            "apiVersion": "[variables('storageApiVersion')]",
            "name": "[parameters('storageAccountName')]",
            "location": "[parameters('location')]",
            "sku": {
                "name": "Standard_LRS"
            },
            "kind": "StorageV2",
            "properties": {
                "supportsHttpsTrafficOnly": true,
                "minimumTlsVersion": "TLS1_2"
            }
        },
        {
            "type": "Microsoft.Web/serverfarms",
            "apiVersion": "[variables('functionAppApiVersion')]",
            "name": "[parameters('appServicePlanName')]",
            "location": "[parameters('location')]",
            "sku": {
                "name": "Y1",
                "tier": "Dynamic"
            },
            "properties": {
                "name": "[parameters('appServicePlanName')]"
            }
        },
        {
            "type": "Microsoft.Web/sites",
            "apiVersion": "[variables('functionAppApiVersion')]",
            "name": "[parameters('appName')]",
            "location": "[parameters('location')]",
            "kind": "functionapp",
            "identity": {
                "type": "SystemAssigned"
            },
            "dependsOn": [
                "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/serverfarms', parameters('appServicePlanName'))]",
                "[resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', parameters('storageAccountName'))]"
            ],
            "properties": {
                "serverFarmId": "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/serverfarms', parameters('appServicePlanName'))]",
                "siteConfig": {
                    "appSettings": [
                        {
                            "name": "FUNCTIONS_EXTENSION_VERSION",
                            "value": "~4"
                        },
                        {
                            "name": "FUNCTIONS_WORKER_RUNTIME",
                            "value": "[variables('functionWorkerRuntime')]"
                        },
                        {
                            "name": "AzureWebJobsStorage",
                            "value": "[concat('DefaultEndpointsProtocol=https;AccountName=', parameters('storageAccountName'), ';AccountKey=', listKeys(resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', parameters('storageAccountName')), variables('storageApiVersion')).keys[0].value)]"
                        },
                        {
                            "name": "WEBSITE_CONTENTAZUREFILECONNECTIONSTRING",
                            "value": "[concat('DefaultEndpointsProtocol=https;AccountName=', parameters('storageAccountName'), ';AccountKey=', listKeys(resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', parameters('storageAccountName')), variables('storageApiVersion')).keys[0].value)]"
                        },
                        {
                            "name": "WEBSITE_CONTENTSHARE",
                            "value": "[toLower(parameters('appName'))]"
                        },
                        {
                            "name": "APPINSIGHTS_INSTRUMENTATIONKEY",
                            "value": ""
                        }
                    ]
                },
                "httpsOnly": true
            }
        },
        {
            "type": "Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults",
            "apiVersion": "[variables('keyVaultApiVersion')]",
            "name": "[parameters('keyVaultName')]",
            "location": "[parameters('location')]",
            "properties": {
                "sku": {
                    "family": "A",
                    "name": "standard"
                },
                "tenantId": "[subscription().tenantId]",
                "enableRbacAuthorization": true,
                "networkAcls": {
                    "defaultAction": "Deny",
                    "bypass": "AzureServices"
                }
            }
        },
        {
            "type": "Microsoft.Sql/servers",
            "apiVersion": "[variables('sqlApiVersion')]",
            "name": "[parameters('sqlServerName')]",
            "location": "[parameters('location')]",
            "properties": {
                "administratorLogin": "sqladmin",
                "administratorLoginPassword": "[newGuid()]",
                "version": "12.0"
            }
        },
        {
            "type": "Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases",
            "apiVersion": "[variables('sqlApiVersion')]",
            "name": "[concat(parameters('sqlServerName'), '/', parameters('sqlDatabaseName'))]",
            "location": "[parameters('location')]",
            "dependsOn": [
                "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('sqlServerName'))]"
            ],
            "sku": {
                "name": "GP_S_Gen5_1",
                "tier": "GeneralPurpose",
                "capacity": 1
            }
        },
        {
            "type": "Microsoft.DocumentDB/databaseAccounts",
            "apiVersion": "[variables('cosmosDbApiVersion')]",
            "name": "[parameters('cosmosDbAccountName')]",
            "location": "[parameters('location')]",
            "kind": "GlobalDocumentDB",
            "properties": {
                "databaseAccountOfferType": "Standard",
                "consistencyPolicy": {
                    "defaultConsistencyLevel": "Session"
                },
                "locations": [
                    {
                        "locationName": "[parameters('location')]",
                        "failoverPriority": 0
                    }
                ]
            }
        },
        {
            "type": "Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments",
            "apiVersion": "[variables('roleAssignmentApiVersion')]",
            "name": "[guid(resourceGroup().id, parameters('appName'), 'StorageBlobDataContributor')]",
            "scope": "[resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', parameters('storageAccountName'))]",
            "dependsOn": [
                "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('appName'))]",
                "[resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', parameters('storageAccountName'))]"
            ],
            "properties": {
                "roleDefinitionId": "[concat('/subscriptions/', subscription().id, '/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions/', 'ba92f5b4-2d11-453d-a403-e96b0029c9fe')]",
                "principalId": "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('appName')), variables('functionAppApiVersion'), 'full').identity.principalId]",
                "principalType": "ServicePrincipal"
            }
        },
        {
            "type": "Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments",
            "apiVersion": "[variables('roleAssignmentApiVersion')]",
            "name": "[guid(resourceGroup().id, parameters('appName'), 'StorageQueueDataContributor')]",
            "scope": "[resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', parameters('storageAccountName'))]",
            "dependsOn": [
                "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('appName'))]",
                "[resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', parameters('storageAccountName'))]"
            ],
            "properties": {
                "roleDefinitionId": "[concat('/subscriptions/', subscription().id, '/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions/', '974c5e8b-4522-4cf7-ad07-590055a2a467')]",
                "principalId": "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('appName')), variables('functionAppApiVersion'), 'full').identity.principalId]",
                "principalType": "ServicePrincipal"
            }
        },
        {
            "type": "Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments",
            "apiVersion": "[variables('roleAssignmentApiVersion')]",
            "name": "[guid(resourceGroup().id, parameters('appName'), 'KeyVaultSecretsUser')]",
            "scope": "[resourceId('Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults', parameters('keyVaultName'))]",
            "dependsOn": [
                "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('appName'))]",
                "[resourceId('Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults', parameters('keyVaultName'))]"
            ],
            "properties": {
                "roleDefinitionId": "[concat('/subscriptions/', subscription().id, '/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions/', '4633458b-17d9-479a-b1d7-b021abcd9f36')]",
                "principalId": "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('appName')), variables('functionAppApiVersion'), 'full').identity.principalId]",
                "principalType": "ServicePrincipal"
            }
        },
        {
            "type": "Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments",
            "apiVersion": "[variables('roleAssignmentApiVersion')]",
            "name": "[guid(resourceGroup().id, parameters('appName'), 'KeyVaultCryptoUser')]",
            "scope": "[resourceId('Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults', parameters('keyVaultName'))]",
            "dependsOn": [
                "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('appName'))]",
                "[resourceId('Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults', parameters('keyVaultName'))]"
            ],
            "properties": {
                "roleDefinitionId": "[concat('/subscriptions/', subscription().id, '/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions/', '1a7b4470-a352-4a00-9896-3a72666ce82b')]",
                "principalId": "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('appName')), variables('functionAppApiVersion'), 'full').identity.principalId]",
                "principalType": "ServicePrincipal"
            }
        },
        {
            "type": "Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments",
            "apiVersion": "[variables('roleAssignmentApiVersion')]",
            "name": "[guid(resourceGroup().id, parameters('appName'), 'SQLServerContributor')]",
            "scope": "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('sqlServerName'))]",
            "dependsOn": [
                "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('appName'))]",
                "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('sqlServerName'))]"
            ],
            "properties": {
                "roleDefinitionId": "[concat('/subscriptions/', subscription().id, '/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions/', '92376974-555e-49b6-b619-2d15290c0a93')]",
                "principalId": "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('appName')), variables('functionAppApiVersion'), 'full').identity.principalId]",
                "principalType": "ServicePrincipal"
            }
        },
        {
            "type": "Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments",
            "apiVersion": "[variables('roleAssignmentApiVersion')]",
            "name": "[guid(resourceGroup().id, parameters('appName'), 'CosmosDBDataContributor')]",
            "scope": "[resourceId('Microsoft.DocumentDB/databaseAccounts', parameters('cosmosDbAccountName'))]",
            "dependsOn": [
                "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('appName'))]",
                "[resourceId('Microsoft.DocumentDB/databaseAccounts', parameters('cosmosDbAccountName'))]"
            ],
            "properties": {
                "roleDefinitionId": "[concat('/subscriptions/', subscription().id, '/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions/', 'c03798e5-39c1-4899-b3dd-8789ad178583')]",

                "principalType": "ServicePrincipal"
